# Template Catalog

A complete, auto-generated index of every phishing simulation template in this
repository, grouped by category. Regenerate with `python3 tools/generate_catalog.py`.

All templates are ready to deploy in self-hosted [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/)
and are fully compatible with **[HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=repo_catalog&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates)**,
the enterprise-ready successor to GoPhish, which imports this metadata directly.

## Summary

- **Templates:** 92
- **Categories:** 29
- **Most recent update:** 2026-06-26

### `ai-tools` — ai-tools

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 2

_Phishing simulation templates that impersonate AI productivity tools (Microsoft Copilot, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot). Employees are increasingly targeted via fake AI-tool license suspension, unusual-activity, or subscription-expiration emails._

| Template | File | Vector | Difficulty | Est. Click Rate | Subject Lines |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Microsoft Copilot – License Suspended | [`copilot_license_suspended.html`](ai-tools/copilot_license_suspended.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% | 4 |
| ChatGPT Plus – Payment Failed / Account Suspended | [`chatgpt_account_suspended.html`](ai-tools/chatgpt_account_suspended.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% | 4 |
